frame_analyses.description: Black frame, video has not started
Instructional frame showing needle grasping position at 2/3 from tip, perpendicular to needle driver
frame_analyses.technique_notes: This is educational content demonstrating proper needle loading technique

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration of needle entry at 90 degrees with tissue assistance from the other hand
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows proper needle angle and bimanual technique for tissue stabilization

frame_analyses.description: Beginning of knot construction, demonstrating the pulley concept to create short and long ends
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational demonstration of proper suture length management

frame_analyses.description: Instructional frame explaining C-loop formation with left instrument and wrist supination
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows technique for creating surgeon's knot with double wrap

frame_analyses.description: Grasping short end and pulling with right instrument while maintaining tension
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates proper technique for securing first throw of surgeon's knot

frame_analyses.description: Creating second throw with C-loop formation using single wrap around instrument
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows proper alternating technique for second throw

frame_analyses.description: Final tightening of knot by grasping short end and pulling tight
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final knot appears secure with good tissue approximation

frame_analyses.description: Completed knot with tutorial closing message about laparoscopic suturing training
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final result shows secure knot with good closure

knot_assessments.notes: Double wrap surgeon's knot performed correctly with C-loop technique
Single throw with proper hand alternation

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Educational demonstration on foam pad shows good tissue approximation

technique_summary: This is an educational demonstration video showing proper intracorporeal knot tying technique with excellent form. The video demonstrates proper needle loading, tissue entry, surgeon's knot construction with hand alternation, and secure final knot.
improvement_suggestions: This is a tutorial video demonstrating ideal technique
No improvements needed for this educational demonstration
strengths: Perfect demonstration of surgeon's knot technique
Excellent educational value with clear technique demonstration
